trans-unit.source: Frontend login and sign-up form powered by WorkOS AuthKit.
WorkOS frontend login is not configured yet. Ask an administrator to finish the WorkOS setup assistant in the TYPO3 backend.
At least 10 characters. Use a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.
We sent a six-digit code to {email}
We sent a verification code to %s. Enter it below to finish signing in.
switch to Login with username and password
We sent a six-digit code to %s. Enter it below to sign in.
This WorkOS account is not linked to a TYPO3 user
We authenticated %s with WorkOS, but no matching backend user exists in TYPO3 and automatic provisioning is turned off.
Ask a TYPO3 administrator to set this e-mail on your backend user, or open the WorkOS setup assistant to enable automatic backend provisioning for trusted domains.
We sent a verification code to %s. Enter it below to finish signing in.
WorkOS backend login is enabled, but not configured.
WorkOS backend login is currently disabled. Configure it in the setup assistant if you want to use it here.
Invite teammates, manage roles and remove users of your WorkOS organization. This view embeds the official WorkOS User Management Widget.
Loading the WorkOS User Management Widget…
Changes made here are applied immediately in WorkOS and propagate to all connected applications.
WorkOS is not configured yet. Enter your API credentials in the Setup Assistant first.
No backend user session could be detected. Please log in again.
Your backend user is not linked to a WorkOS account. Sign in once via the WorkOS login tab to link it, then return to this module.
Your WorkOS user is not a member of any organization yet. Pick an existing organization or create a new one to unlock the user management widget.
WorkOS could not issue a widget token. Verify your API key has the "widgets:users-table:manage" scope.
The WorkOS widget is currently unavailable.
Please select an organization to join.
Please provide a name for the new organization.
Could not join the selected organization.
You have been added to the organization as an admin.
Organization "%s" created and linked to your user.
One more step before you can manage users
WorkOS organizes user management around organizations. Assign yourself to one to enable the widget.
You currently have access to one organization: %s.
A new organization will be created in WorkOS and you will be linked to it as an admin.
Register these callback URLs in the WorkOS Dashboard under Redirects so WorkOS can redirect back to your site after authentication.
Where to add them in WorkOS
Open your WorkOS Dashboard, go to Redirects, and add each callback URL listed above. Use the + Add button to add one URL at a time, then click Save changes.
WorkOS requires a strong cookie password with at least 32 characters.
Generate a fresh cookie password on save
Expose the WorkOS-powered login routes on the website.
Provision a new fe_users record after a successful WorkOS sign-in if no matching user exists.
Link existing frontend users by email
Match WorkOS sign-ins to existing frontend users that share the same email address.
Page UID where new fe_users records are stored. Required when auto-creation is enabled.
Comma-separated list of fe_groups UIDs assigned to auto-created frontend users.
Public URL path that starts the WorkOS sign-in flow for frontend users.
URL path WorkOS redirects to after a successful sign-in. Must match a redirect URI registered in WorkOS.
URL path that ends the WorkOS session and signs the frontend user out.
Path users are redirected to after a successful sign-in (for example /).
Show the WorkOS sign-in option on the TYPO3 backend login screen.
Provision a new be_users record after a successful WorkOS sign-in if no matching user exists.
Link existing backend users by email
Match WorkOS sign-ins to existing backend users that share the same email address.
Comma-separated list of be_groups UIDs assigned to auto-created backend users.
Leave empty to allow every domain when auto-creation is enabled.
URL path that starts the WorkOS sign-in flow for backend users.
URL path WorkOS redirects to after a successful backend sign-in. Must match a registered redirect URI.
Backend route to open after a successful sign-in (for example /main).
Sign-in failed. Please try again or contact your administrator.
Magic Auth is not enabled. Enable it in the WorkOS Dashboard under Authentication → Methods → Magic Auth.
This authentication method is not enabled. Check your WorkOS Dashboard under Authentication → Methods.
Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
No account found for this email. Please sign up first.
Magic auth session expired. Please try again.
Your verification session has expired. Please sign in again to receive a new code.
We sent you a new verification code. Please check your inbox.
Please enter both email and password.
Please fill in email and password.
Your password must be at least 10 characters long.
Your password must be at least 10 characters long. Please add more characters and try again.

Your password is too easy to guess. Please choose one that is at least 10 characters long and combines uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and at least one symbol (for example ! ? @ # $). Avoid your name, email, common words, keyboard patterns like "qwerty" or "1234", and repeated characters.
This password has appeared in a known data breach and is no longer safe to use. Please choose a different password that you have never used on another website.
An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.

Your password does not meet the requirements. Please choose one that is at least 10 characters long and combines uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and at least one symbol (for example ! ? @ # $).
Invalid magic auth session. Please try again.
The form token is invalid. Reload the module and try again.
The WorkOS configuration has been saved to TYPO3 system settings.
The configuration has been saved, but the setup is not ready yet: {errors}
A WorkOS API key is required when frontend or backend login is enabled.
A WorkOS client ID is required when frontend or backend login is enabled.
The WorkOS cookie password must be at least 32 characters long.
Automatic frontend user creation needs a storage PID greater than 0.
Automatic backend user creation needs at least one backend group UID.
Signed-in user dashboard: profile, password, MFA, and sessions.
Please sign in to manage your WorkOS account.
This frontend user is not linked to a WorkOS account, so the Account Center cannot show profile data.
Update the name your team and customers see.
Choose a strong password (at least 10 characters).
Add an authenticator app for an extra layer of security on your account.
Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
Can't scan? Enter this secret manually:
No authenticator app set up yet.
Devices currently signed in to your WorkOS account.
Workspaces and teams your account belongs to.
You are not a member of any organization yet.
Could not update your profile. Please try again.
Please enter and confirm a new password.
Password must be at least 10 characters long.
That password is too easy to guess. Please pick a stronger one.
That password has appeared in a known data breach. Please pick a different one.
Could not update your password. Please try again.
Could not start authenticator setup. Please try again.
The authenticator setup expired. Please start again.
That code is not valid. Please try the latest code from your authenticator app.
Could not remove the authenticator. Please try again.
Could not sign that session out. Please try again.
Security check failed. Please reload the page and try again.
Your WorkOS profile could not be loaded.
Your authentication factors could not be loaded.
Your active sessions could not be loaded.
Your organization memberships could not be loaded.
Team and organisation management for the signed-in WorkOS user.
Invite teammates, manage pending invitations and launch one-time WorkOS Admin Portal sessions for SSO, Directory Sync and audit logging.
Please sign in to access the team workspace.
You're not a member of any active WorkOS organization yet.
Open a one-time hosted setup session in the WorkOS Admin Portal. Each link is signed and scoped to this organization.
WorkOS will email a one-time accept link. Optionally provide a role slug.
Recent invitations issued for this organization.
Please enter an email address and pick an organization.
That email address is not valid.
That person already has a pending invitation or account.
Could not send the invitation. Please try again.
Could not resend the invitation. Please try again.
Could not revoke the invitation. Please try again.
Please pick an organization and a portal intent.
Could not open the WorkOS Admin Portal. Please try again.
Security check failed. Please reload the page and try again.
You are not allowed to manage this organization.
Your active organizations could not be loaded.
Invitations for this organization could not be loaded.
